title: Lead Engineers (Software Development)
description:
Panasonic

Enriching Lives Through

INNOVATION & TECHNOLOGY

Going beyond just providing goodproducts, we at Panasonic are firmly entrenched in the brief of deliveringideas that will have a profound impact on people’s lives around the world. Atthe forefront of this endeavor is ensuring that our ideas are allied with therelentless pursuit of reaching new heights of excellence when it comes topushing the boundaries of innovation. This allows us to focus on enriching thepresent and enhancing the future for societies throughout the globe.

We invite enthusiastic and dedicatedindividuals to join us as:

Lead Engineers (SoftwareDevelopment)

Responsibilities:

1.    Modifycontrol software of the autonomous mobile robot “HOSPI” to customers' purposes.

2.    Developadditional functions for management software of “HOSPI” (HOSPI server) forcustomers.

3.    Applythe latest innovations to improve HOSPI's performance.

4.    Supportthe Sales Department in promotion PoC (Proof of Concept) of the autonomousmobile robot.

5.     Integrate HOSPI intocustomers' environment with applying the designated local functions.

6.     Manage the developed software usingGitHub.

7.     Automate module testing of each softwaremodule to facilitate updates of developed software.

8.     Automate system testing to increasesoftware versatility.

9.     Provide appropriate advice based on extensiveknowledge and experience for software development teams in Japan.

Requirements:

1.    Atleast Bachelor's Degree or above in Engineering, Robotics, SoftwareDevelopment, or related field.

2.    Proficientin C/C++ and good in Python.

3.    Experienceof ROS2 development.

4.    Atleast 1 year experience in one or more of the following:-

a.    roboticsor software development of autonomous mobile robots or AGVs.

b.     software development ofdatabase software or system software using GitHub

5.    Ableto understand robotics and robotics development.

6.    Ableto produce specification sheet of software or of software code.

7.    Strong leadership skill.  Experience in project management is a plus.

8.    Excellent interpersonal, verbal, and writtencommunication skills.

  1. Self-driven, collaborative, and outcome-oriented team player.

Pleasevisit the company website to apply by submitting a complete resume and academictranscripts by 10th February 2026,giving full details of your background, experience, career objectives, currentand expected salaries, contact number(s) together with a recent non-returnablephotograph to:

PANASONIC R&DCENTER SINGAPORE

202 Bedok South Avenue 1 #02-11Singapore 469332

Website:  https://research.sg.panasonic.com/

(Weregret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.)
